name: 混乱文件夹整理归档

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: how files are examined before organizing (read content of each vs. judge by filename/type vs. quick scan)
observable_attributes.directory_style: resulting directory structure (flat grouping vs. nested topic hierarchy vs. by file type vs. by date)
observable_attributes.naming: whether and how files are renamed (preserve original vs. add prefixes vs. standardize naming convention)
observable_attributes.version_strategy: handling of apparent duplicates or old versions (keep all vs. archive vs. delete)

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹里堆满了各种文件——文档、邮件、图片、笔记、日历文件、聊天记录，全部混在一起没有任何组织。请将这些文件整理成合理的目录结构。你可以创建子文件夹、移动文件、重命名文件，以你认为最合理的方式组织。整理完成后，在根目录写一份简短的整理说明，解释你的组织逻辑。
prompt_en: This folder is packed with various files -- documents, emails, images, notes, calendar files, chat logs -- all mixed together with no organization. Please reorganize these files into a sensible directory structure. You may create subdirectories, move files, and rename files in whatever way you think is most logical. After organizing, write a brief reorganization note in the root directory explaining your organizational logic.
behavioral_freedom: Classification dimensions: by file type vs. by topic/project vs. by date vs. by importance
Directory depth: flat categories vs. multi-level hierarchy
Whether to rename files for consistency or preserve original names
How to handle ambiguous files that could belong to multiple categories
Whether to create an archive/old folder for outdated items
Level of detail in the reorganization note
Whether to scan file content before deciding placement vs. organize by filename alone
